plan_analysis:
The pre-research context gives biographical background on the two leaders, historical overviews of their parties, and a skeletal description of the opinion-polling page, but it is missing the numerical poll tables, seat-projection data, details of the electoral formula, and any evaluation of past poll accuracy.  
To build a strong evidence base, forecasters still need:  
• Base-rate data – historical seat differences between the first and second parties, how often the poll leader ultimately wins, and typical poll-to-result errors.  
• Precise resolution mechanism – description of the Slovenian electoral system (districts, D’Hondt allocation, 88 vs 90 seats) so that vote shares can be translated into seats.  
• Key drivers – up-to-date polling (vote shares, seat projections, leader and cabinet approval); macro indicators and salient events that could move late voters (economy, scandals, referendums).  
• Current state – the most recent polls from Mediana, Ninamedia/Vox Populi, Parsifal, Valicon, and any March 2026 MRP seat projections; news on campaign themes, debates, or last-minute shocks.  
• Contrarian signals – reporting that GS is regaining momentum, a possible SDS misstep, or evidence turnout patterns may favour the incumbent coalition.  

The eight queries below are designed to pull in (1) historical election and polling accuracy data; (2) details of the seat-allocation mechanism; (3) the very latest published polling and seat projections; and (4) news that could flip the conventional narrative.

queries_planned.intent: Retrieve a full historical table of seat counts for all elections to calculate typical SDS/GS (or predecessors) seat differences and leadership patterns.

queries_planned.query: slovenia electoral system d’hondt 88 seats allocation
queries_planned.intent: Obtain an authoritative description of the legal seat-allocation rules that will determine the official result used for resolution.

queries_planned.query: [HISTORICAL] Provide a table of every Slovenian parliamentary election since 1992 showing the seat counts of the two largest parties, compute the seat-difference (1st minus 2nd), indicate which party formed the government, and summarise average final-poll vs result errors for SDS and GS or their predecessors.
queries_planned.intent: Build a quantitative base rate for seat differences and poll accuracy.

queries_planned.query: slovene opinion polls accuracy past elections
queries_planned.intent: Find academic or media analyses measuring historical polling errors to refine uncertainty estimates.

queries_planned.query: Mediana poll March 2026 SDS GS seats
queries_planned.intent: Pull the very latest Mediana vote-share and seat-projection numbers published in March 2026.

queries_planned.query: Vox Populi poll February 2026 Slovenia election
queries_planned.intent: Capture the newest Ninamedia/Vox Populi polling to compare with other series.
Locate any March 2026 MRP or model-based seat forecasts that directly estimate SDS and GS seat counts.

queries_planned.query: AskNews: Coverage since January 2026 on Slovenian campaign setbacks or scandals affecting Freedom Movement or SDS, including economic data releases, debates, or corruption stories.
queries_planned.intent: Surface contrarian or late-breaking developments that could swing undecided voters and alter the expected seat difference.

urls.error: Wikipedia page not found: Freedom Movement \(Slovenia\
